title: TODO: short title
description: Redis is in an OOM (out-of-memory) error state. The config sets maxmemory 16mb with maxmemory-policy noeviction — meaning Redis refuses all writes when the limit is reached rather than evicting old keys. A 24 MB stale cache.rdb dump is also consuming disk. Both must be fixed to restore stability.
hint_1: inspect the eviction policy in redis.conf
hint_2: change to allkeys-lru and remove the stale cache.rdb
hint_3: update service.state to stable to complete the fix
